Increasing calories further might be premature if these other aspects have not yet been addressed adequately through observation and possibly additional therapies like addressing anxiety symptoms directly via appropriate dosing adjustments under close monitoring by healthcare professionals familiar with eating disorders.

This could indicate an issue related to digestive health that needs evaluation before escalating solely based on caloric content. Therefore, while option D seems reasonable initially due to insufficient evidence supporting current approach, we should consider ruling out absorptive capacity first.
